message:
feat(aws): rewrite manifest to schema 2.1 and improve E2E verification script

Manifest rewritten from ~266 to ~484 lines with full fcp-connector-manifest
schema 2.1 compliance: interface hash, stateless state model, zone
permissions with forbidden list, granular network capabilities
(dns, egress, tls.sni), and complete operation definitions for S3
(list_buckets, get_object, put_object, delete_object), EC2 (list_instances,
start_instance, stop_instance, terminate_instance), Lambda (list_functions,
invoke_function), and STS (get_caller_identity) with risk levels, safety
tiers, approval modes, idempotency classes, network constraints, and
AI agent hints per operation.

E2E script: Add local fwc binary detection — if FWC_MANIFEST_BIN exists
on PATH, use it directly instead of tunneling through rch exec cargo run,
reducing verification latency. Record the manifest_check_runner method
in environment.json for audit traceability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,266 +1,484 @@
-[format]
-type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
 schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:b381bd4a256cb16cb481b65312841b7480883d6ca28b6a860481a9127ef0a890"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.aws"
 name = "AWS"
 version = "0.1.0"
 description = "AWS connector for S3, EC2, Lambda, and STS workflows; deterministic verification currently relies on custom endpoint overrides until SigV4 signing is implemented"
-archetype = "cloud-control-plane"
-homepage = "https://docs.aws.amazon.com/"
+archetypes = ["operational", "storage"]
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "No durable connector state; configuration, credentials, and the HTTP runtime live only inside the current connector instance."
 
 [zones]
 home = "z:work"
 allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
 allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
-tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+forbidden = ["z:public", "z:community"]
 
 [capabilities]
-required = ["network.outbound"]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.egress", "network.tls.sni"]
 optional = []
-forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
-
-# ── S3 operations ──
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "network.listen", "system.privileged"]

 port_allow = [443]

+cidr_deny = []

+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
 max_redirects = 0

-when_to_use = "When you need to list all S3 buckets in the account"

@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@ risky_mutation_status="pending"
 compliance_status="pending"
 integration_suite_status="pending"
 clippy_status="pending"
+manifest_check_runner=""
 
 require_cmd() {
   if ! command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
@@ -86,10 +87,42 @@ classify_manifest_failure() {
 
 require_cmd rch
 
+FWC_MANIFEST_BIN="${FWC_MANIFEST_BIN:-fwc}"
+manifest_check_cmd=()
+if command -v "${FWC_MANIFEST_BIN}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  manifest_check_runner="local:${FWC_MANIFEST_BIN}"
+  manifest_check_cmd=(
+    "${FWC_MANIFEST_BIN}"
+    manifest
+    fix
+    connectors/aws/manifest.toml
+    --check
+    --json
+  )
+else
+  manifest_check_runner="rch:cargo-run"
+  manifest_check_cmd=(
+    rch
+    exec
+    --
+    cargo
+    run
+    -q
+    -p
+    fwc
+    --
+    manifest
+    fix
+    connectors/aws/manifest.toml
+    --check
+    --json
+  )
+fi
+
 if run_capture_stdout \
   manifest_check \
